coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a powerful desire for impact and connection, yet your execution on foundational disciplines like Sleep and Training is collapsing because you're consistently failing to translate that morning gratitude and intention into disciplined evening routines and physical stewardship. The root cause is a catastrophic imbalance in self-awareness, where your high-level aspirations are completely disconnected from the daily physical and temporal commitments required to sustain them, eroding the very spiritual and mental resilience necessary for elite performance. Immediately tonight, set an alarm for 9:00 PM and, upon its trigger, physically transition to your bedroom, initiating your Sleep Protocol regardless of outstanding tasks or perceived urgency.
